separation_rule: JSON = LEDGER. MDC = INSTRUCTIONS. Never duplicate.

entries.impact: Ensures MCP tools can locate cortex and lobe files after directory reorganization

entries.impact: Provides structured guidance for Claude to help implement remaining 47 actions across 6 new MCP tools

entries.change: Implemented neocortex_manifest tool (3 actions) for manifest management
entries.impact: Enables lightweight indexing of lobes/cortex with metadata, tags, and querying

entries.change: Implemented neocortex_kg tool (5 actions) for Mini Knowledge Graph
entries.impact: Evolves Compact Encoding to semantic graph with entities, relations, and visualization

entries.change: Expanded neocortex_cortex tool with get_workflows action
entries.impact: Completes PHASE 1 (Manifestos + KG) with all planned functionality

entries.change: Implemented neocortex_consolidation tool (3 actions: summarize_session, merge_learnings, promote_to_rule)
entries.impact: Enables semantic consolidation of ephemeral experience into permanent rules

session_timeline.description: Created central cortex ($ctx) and ledger ($ldg) with NeoCortex v4.2 structure
Implemented NC naming convention and renamed core files to NC- format
Updated MCP server paths to use DIR-CORE-FR-001-core-central structure
Created NC-LBE-FR-002-claude-assistant.mdc with specialized instructions for Claude to help implement framework expansion
Implemented neocortex_manifest tool with 3 actions (generate, update, query) for manifest management
Implemented neocortex_kg tool with 5 actions (add_entity, add_relation, query_relations, find_similar, visualize) for Mini Knowledge Graph
Expanded neocortex_cortex tool with get_workflows action to extract workflows from cortex content
Updated Antigravity MCP config with NeoCortex server reference (corrected Python path to C:\Program Files\Python312\python.exe)
Implemented neocortex_consolidation tool with 3 actions (summarize_session, merge_learnings, promote_to_rule) for semantic consolidation
Implemented neocortex_akl tool with 3 actions (assess_importance, decay_knowledge, suggest_cleanup) for Adaptive Knowledge Lifecycle
Session ended after completing PHASE 2 (Consolidacao + AKL). Framework at 14/16 MCP tools, 48/81 actions.
